date_from.description: Window start: relative ('-7d', '-30d') or ISO8601. Defaults to -7d; the window may span at most 30 days.

date_to.description: Window end: relative or ISO8601. Defaults to now.

limit.description: Maximum number of tests to return (1-200). Defaults to 50.

min_failed_prs.description: A test qualifies once it failed on at least this many distinct pull requests in the window (OR-ed with min_rerun_passes). Minimum 1. Defaults to 3.

min_rerun_passes.description: A test qualifies once it passed on retry at least this many times in the window (OR-ed with min_failed_prs). Minimum 1. Defaults to 1.

source_id.description: Connected GitHub data warehouse source to read from. Defaults to the oldest connected GitHub source when the team has more than one.
